name: Tina Smith
subject: I'll be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200223-mm5?refcode=em200223-mm5&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to my re-election campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline. Let me explain why:

The truth is, we are behind on our grassroots fundraising target for the month. And if we're not careful, the already-limited resources we have to build a winning campaign will dwindle down even more -- and we could lose this election.

The good news is there's a light at the end of the tunnel. We're not that far behind where we need to be for February and if we meet this goal, we will be on track for the quarter.

But I cannot do this alone. It's going to take a groundswell of grassroots supporters like you giving what you can to help us win re-election. And I'll be honest: A donation of just $5, $10, or whatever you're able to spare before the deadline on Saturday should do the trick.

So here comes the part where I ask for your help:

**Will you rush a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline this week? Anything you pitch in makes a real difference in our race to save Minnesota's Senate seat and flip the majority.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200223-mm5?refcode=em200223-mm5&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200223-mm5?refcode=em200223-mm5&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")

I'm very fortunate to have supporters like you I can count on, and I'm so grateful you are part of the team. Every dollar you give keeps me focused on fighting for our values -- and if we're successful, I'll get the opportunity to continue our fight in the U.S. Senate.

Thanks for all you do.

-- Tina

name: Team Hunt
subject: Grassroots Momentum!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

We wanted to send you a quick thank you note for all of your help this weekend. With less than 2 weeks until election day, our campaign had it's strongest grassroots effort yet!

On Friday Night, we hosted our **50th Meet and Greet** event! Thank you to all of our hosts and attendees who have made all of these events such a success!

Then, on Saturday, our volunteer army knocked on more than **5,000 doors** in just one day! That's a lot of hard work, dedication and shoe leather!

Finally, today, we had more than **300 fired up Republicans** attend our GOTV Rally with Senator Cruz!

That's what grassroots momentum is all about!

But our fight doesn't stop there. We have just over one week left until Election Day. We need your help to make sure that every single Republican comes out to support Wesley in the Primary. _**Can we count on you to get 5 friends, neighbors, or family members to the polls? **_

Thank you for all of your help! Together we can take back CD7!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=9c7991d974d7499ebffbb717a6673b72&_e=8e3pA9qjxbzWElj6LnCuGm_IVkD-31_L-uCyuNEiQUJy1zdS0yOUxhkgbje99DrsWkMq3OPJfMvhLh-3NaHD858pWQ2C3Wm8VNMqQgDDvDHnO2gZVc-JhDMqadQ4ceBSLQ4SKhG-tAXBjS-F6hj0r7X1ZnSbePLnW0knTGDXrHiL1-yj_KypmBhHNFU0wSL88hvjbXKk28SWJ8LJt3pZppguhOOQpl12paw3RDXFCVE0uGkxxDlpVWcb-izrG9N-GIZSyc5L3joF3J5KxBJfCyBJ19y6Ut2G0tUQZbBhlsc%3D)****

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jack=20Wyman?=
subject: My Father's Iwo Jima
body:
75 Years Since Iwo Jima | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jackwymanforcongress.com/change-is-coming-9166329?e=6ec218cf46)
---
| |
---
| | Today marks 75 years since the American flag was raised on Iwo Jima.

What has become an iconic image of WWII – six Marines planting the stars and stripes on a rugged mountaintop – was a brutal reality for my father and the other Marines who fought that bloody battle. My dad’s stories of Iwo Jima are among my earliest memories.

Today I invite you to read my tribute to him and all who fight for freedom. May we never forget the cost. [**Uncommon Valor: My Father’s Iwo Jima**](https://jackwymanforcongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b7da279d3ff003820c324b066&id=0d395463bd&e=6ec218cf46)

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Closing Argument - Part I
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Why I'm Running

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15358681/162074318/-1907457918?refcode=02142020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzAwODZlMy0xNjU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9lB5M6StIrU0y__MnfWYNYhlkWWh-cVdgpgLdZIenHY=)
---
Dear Friend, We're now only eight days away from the primary election. Over the next week I'll present my closing arguments as to why my life, professional, and electoral experience, and my positions on the issues make me the best candidate to beat Pete Sessions - or whoever emerges as the Republican nominee - on election day in November. But first, why am I running? For the same reasons I ran two years ago. Our Congress is broken and dysfunctional. It has walked away from many of its Constitutional duties and has ceded much of its power to the executive branch. It has failed to deal with the very real issues of health care, immigration, infrastructure, and economic insecurity that impact the lives of thousands of Central Texans. Too many in Congress are ideologues, opportunists, or publicity hounds. Too few are problem solvers dedicated to improving our quality of life and strengthening America to cope with the challenges, both foreseen and unforeseen, that we'll face in the 21st century. Sarah and I have five teenagers. They are quickly approaching young adulthood. I am convinced that if we don't change course immediately, instead of handing down a strong, united, and prosperous America to our kids, we'll be handing them a divided and diminished America that will require generations to rebuild. I see our current situation as an existential threat to our way of life. That's why I'm running. But I can't do it alone. clean_body: Why I'm Running | = Dear Friend, We're now only eight days away from the primary election. Over the next week I'll present my closing arguments as to why my life, professional, and electoral experience, and my positions on the issues make me the best candidate to beat Pete Sessions - or whoever emerges as the Republican nominee - on election day in November. But first, why am I running? For the same reasons I ran two years ago. Our Congress is broken and dysfunctional. It has walked away from many of its Constitutional duties and has ceded much of its power to the executive branch. It has failed to deal with the very real issues of health care, immigration, infrastructure, and economic insecurity that impact the lives of thousands of Central Texans. Too many in Congress are ideologues, opportunists, or publicity hounds. Too few are problem solvers dedicated to improving our quality of life and strengthening America to cope with the challenges, both foreseen and unforeseen, that we'll face in the 21st century. Sarah and I have five teenagers. They are quickly approaching young adulthood. I am convinced that if we don't change course immediately, instead of handing down a strong, united, and prosperous America to our kids, we'll be handing them a divided and diminished America that will require generations to rebuild. I see our current situation as an existential threat to our way of life. That's why I'm running. But I can't do it alone. We're now transitioning from funding our primary activities to building the base for our post-primary run. And we have an end-of-month goal coming up that we are short of. = | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thank you, Rick | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15359509/162081922/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDY0N2YwMi0xOTU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tBNw-w_uPRTIyn7lXv274n-G3s2ibdhBRjIe1pR-eRg=&emci=d3647f02-1957-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=d4647f02-1957-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter,

In politics, doing what is best for the people is not always rewarded. That will come as no surprise to you. And that’s what makes this moment, right now, so special.

When we started this campaign in early 2019, I traveled to Washington, D.C. with our first flyer. Our literature emphasized four issues: Medicare for All, Voting Rights, Ending the War on Drugs, and a Green New Deal. And as I took meetings with political leaders and campaign consultants, I was told again and again: “don’t talk about that.”

In particular, I was told: “Don’t mention a ‘Green New Deal’ in Texas.” “You can’t win if you talk about that.”

I listened carefully to what I was being told. I considered leaving out the phrase “Green New Deal” and talking generically about climate change. And ultimately, I made a choice: if I am going to quit my job to run for Congress—if I am going to ask my wife and my family to sacrifice, at great expense, so I can give it my all—I’d better be fighting for something I believe in.

Although we have taken hits along the way—big Democratic donors who won’t support me, two primary challengers who claim to be more “pragmatic” on climate change—we’ve run a campaign that has made fighting for a Green New Deal a core part of our program. Because it’s the right thing to do. Because our collective future depends on it.

And in the last few weeks, we’ve been rewarded in ways we could not imagine. First, it was winning the support of fossil fuel workers to get the Texas AFL-CIO endorsement. Then, it was a series of national articles, highlighting our remarkable coalition of climate change activists and labor unions. And then, this last Friday, it was the endorsement of the Houston Chronicle — the paper of record for the largest city in Texas, here in the epicenter of the fossil fuel industry.

The people are responding. Major Texas institutions are responding. And we have a wonderful chance to win this race in just 8 days!

**[Will you stand with me and our campaign and donate before Election Day?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15359510/162081923/776973499?refcode=em022420&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDY0N2YwMi0xOTU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tBNw-w_uPRTIyn7lXv274n-G3s2ibdhBRjIe1pR-eRg=)**

Thank you for believing in us. Thank you for helping us build a powerful campaign: that is galvanizing a growing movement across Texas, and allows us to fight for what we believe.

With love and solidarity,
Mike
* * *

| Peter,
[Preparation is over. This is a live fire exercise.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y8kRnSuFeSngjDtpzwa3Mok5sc-9XXvoo_pK6fzTmBtFjlLfNDEhNiaobr0q6SREfuBSqUy63Qp6N5iaY69OLOLm1yCzOQ9l8g49tjWsjD-NfWU2RVOuFbO6_qlY0kay2114o2fbLqT5kco2HdQ6OSH4q7atIzXWRKEBAGcbLVpdyzVv_uNKvyee9cGZkOYf8H52Vzcy0NQ=&c=RW8zE_TiKfvj7vD6Iyzvnq-rQ46lWqjZAknxrn-VAwzV-_2dmGqXOw==&ch=DHCL1ASxfgfiTj4h9F3iQkgTuhIIvSDvml7TEIbouMHiQu_IauO68Q==) 💥
[Early voting for the March 3rd Election](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y8kRnSuFeSngjDtpzwa3Mok5sc-9XXvoo_pK6fzTmBtFjlLfNDEhNltdBT7UaN7z24uQScYc_qYdWBqCnZCWeP2qKYrBJsiniZVNKpdp5MFeiGoPseKpu671i4gL8UzYSBHnEtIsAGUUi_9aKWR52IyV5_YcBdL3&c=RW8zE_TiKfvj7vD6Iyzvnq-rQ46lWqjZAknxrn-VAwzV-_2dmGqXOw==&ch=DHCL1ASxfgfiTj4h9F3iQkgTuhIIvSDvml7TEIbouMHiQu_IauO68Q==) is here and in order to take our fight to the Democrats this November, we've got to show the out-of-state liberals who want to buy Texas that we mean business and we're ready for war.
[That means 20 new donors before midnight TONIGHT to make our goal. Will you be one of the 20?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001y8kRnSuFeSngjDtpzwa3Mok5sc-9XXvoo_pK6fzTmBtFjlLfNDEhNiaobr0q6SREfuBSqUy63Qp6N5iaY69OLOLm1yCzOQ9l8g49tjWsjD-NfWU2RVOuFbO6_qlY0kay2114o2fbLqT5kco2HdQ6OSH4q7atIzXWRKEBAGcbLVpdyzVv_uNKvyee9cGZkOYf8H52Vzcy0NQ=&c=RW8zE_TiKfvj7vD6Iyzvnq-rQ46lWqjZAknxrn-VAwzV-_2dmGqXOw==&ch=DHCL1ASxfgfiTj4h9F3iQkgTuhIIvSDvml7TEIbouMHiQu_IauO68Q==)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20Guest?=
subject: Election Day is Two Weeks Away
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1d8b270bfe77/election-day-is-two-weeks-away?e=6645c92bcf)
---
| |
---
| |
Dear Friend,

The Republican primary election is just two weeks away!

On Tuesday, March 10, Republicans in our state will head to the polls to vote, and I need your help to make sure we have a strong turnout and show of support. Haley and I are working hard to visit with as many people as possible all across the district.

For many people, March 10 is during Spring Break week so if you’re going to be out of town on March 10, make sure to vote by absentee ballot between now and March 7 at 12:00 noon (the deadline for absentee voting). To find out more details about absentee voting, please contact your [local circuit clerk](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=f4bbe1375a&e=6645c92bcf).

I’m honored to serve you in Congress, and I’m asking for your vote based on my work on your behalf, and my conservative voting record. If you can help our campaign finish strong between now and March 10 by making a [donation](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=5a5468c935&e=6645c92bcf) today, I would greatly appreciate your support.

In Congress, I’ve voted with President Trump’s positions on issues [97%](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=ffd6f9944e&e=6645c92bcf) of the time, and I’ve worked with him to help our economy grow, to rebuild our military and to secure the border.

I’ve recently been endorsed by the Mississippi Manufacturers Association and the National Rifle Association (NRA), and I’ve received an “A” rating from the Susan B. Anthony National Pro-Life scorecard and a 100% voting score from the Family Research Council for my work on pro-life, pro-family and pro-religious freedom legislation.

I hope you will [join](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=9fcb1e7fd5&e=6645c92bcf) our campaign today so I can continue working on your behalf to represent our conservative values.

Election Day is right around the corner on March 10th, and I hope you will ask your family and friends to vote in this important election. Thank you!

---
|
---
| Michael Guest United States Congressman
---
| | | | | | | [](https://michaelguest.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ae3ece7e42a6ae24d22e0094b&id=d4aab9e55e&e=6645c92bcf)
---

body:
This campaign isn’t about any one person. This campaign is part of a movement of people across the country standing up and demanding real change for working people. But running a people powered campaign has its challenges | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zj/JNUTncBQSAqnqco6fFlytw/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKkUdSjb-2FX1WRfPJZ5UojvUgl9NrX9ybURehiq9DSOR7Ri34tB-2FnTGsKoiaBpyinnV4B7PV3ncsooAd0F1Rpx1loFyaJ5WfVpMpLGsNn2j2yuA9YvNKHEEx99GRW1ymgQxBDT8l6E0Hd8sWt8XP0p0nVajjDSu-2FVSvxZFCRb8UQiTKVJfq7Zc7QMqWr-2F1xz9TLgcXE-2FgeykJRIktvKdmW17auHsMpTu2z2G8Ou35wxwEw-3D-3D/NiMR)
Friend, **** **** **** This campaign isn’t about any one person. This campaign is part of a movement of people across the country standing up and demanding real change for working people. But running a people-powered campaign has its challenges. We don’t accept corporate PAC money and we’re not able to self-fund our race with hundreds of thousands of dollars of personal money. Our support comes from everyday people doing what they can, chipping in a couple dollars here and there or spending their Saturday mornings knocking doors for Mondaire.
With petitioning starting tomorrow, we want to show the strength of our grassroots movement. That’s why we set a goal of raising 100 grassroots donations **_today_**. Those donations are going to help us get more petitions printed, get more campaign literature to our canvassers, and make sure we can get Mondaire’s message out to every single voter in the district. Today, we’re asking you to do two things. **_[One, can you make a donation today of any amount to help us hit our goal of 100 donations?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zj/JNUTncBQSAqnqco6fFlytw/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKkUdSjb-2FX1WRfPJZ5UojvUukwHRQIYfouZhg2EIs0GDqPUI2CXr-2BHJSUcfVvTZ9sM41KVc-2BXwWOV53XoiUFhDAw6l1mHHOjfEhkiVoaZ3sS0JVt0PI4W377OJCtr8WcbEK33sKbC1jH-2FXGIfa1ZFDFyYi5XXF-2BYviPApu8MbFT0KhnGaXUuYOTjCMTWcCDQzh-2B8P4nMCnSj5ny5V4UmsqVmcamGoEAjNrMN0F0zfAx8A-3D-3D/adxB)_** Two, can you reach out to just three friends and ask them to join you in supporting Mondaire? If you forward this email with a note on why you support Mondaire, it will help us grow our support and make this movement even more powerful.
[Help us hit 100 donations »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/FAE/ni0YAA/t.2zj/JNUTncBQSAqnqco6fFlytw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKkUdSjb-2FX1WRfPJZ5UojvUOe9wFbbzxmMsqFiK9VK5DqxSlPgAO6ft4TwS0RhxoVWfWEIKwZYfia42jMJlaHisJytGBtwfjhv-2BB28X5HLSetIawl1LR5Z1HdeVAXLNfLAs5z06Gb6536zR7jsMp7IXOe-2FzB1nXn1XiCf8eLNZq2Z7ZBmmyZ0dXPpyM-2B6YrsveK862taZcObkuZ5PZlO1PqmpOckhmGtECa2SBwF-2BQE3w-3D-3D/SpmY)

| | | | | | Peter,
[We need you on board!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xJVo0_pRbb8KXxf4b7BQMor5G87pYkJOL3bQQHe9slNlZwc7eSSnbItvnyQ2YJ9PwBXW98watk7jKxyIj1GftTpzmqg3hSkncyIbH197QQhcpoIXEm8L501vWc5BfR25-x6j5AOci-xm_jC4krPtNTkFE0EIOUUNhGijg6aSqlwV_4B5gsk737gD2DDd_PU0-MVkcVpe7j0=&c=PuuNB3ks4lI1pVep5m36age_FlmgsaVbJwdYG-iQW02A06UloT4jug==&ch=rH7NM89DOpZViwb155dQOl_89rbwcPM-68FYEzwFznDiHFjeD6Sg8Q==)
With just a few hours left to make our goal, we need several more people to step up to help us come through on March 3rd ahead.
[Democrats have proven they will stop at nothing to turn Texas and our nation blue](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xJVo0_pRbb8KXxf4b7BQMor5G87pYkJOL3bQQHe9slNlZwc7eSSnbItvnyQ2YJ9PwBXW98watk7jKxyIj1GftTpzmqg3hSkncyIbH197QQhcpoIXEm8L501vWc5BfR25-x6j5AOci-xm_jC4krPtNTkFE0EIOUUNhGijg6aSqlwV_4B5gsk737gD2DDd_PU0-MVkcVpe7j0=&c=PuuNB3ks4lI1pVep5m36age_FlmgsaVbJwdYG-iQW02A06UloT4jug==&ch=rH7NM89DOpZViwb155dQOl_89rbwcPM-68FYEzwFznDiHFjeD6Sg8Q==) in order to impose socialism and upend our Constitutional liberties.
[Join us here and help fight back for Texas!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xJVo0_pRbb8KXxf4b7BQMor5G87pYkJOL3bQQHe9slNlZwc7eSSnbItvnyQ2YJ9PwBXW98watk7jKxyIj1GftTpzmqg3hSkncyIbH197QQhcpoIXEm8L501vWc5BfR25-x6j5AOci-xm_jC4krPtNTkFE0EIOUUNhGijg6aSqlwV_4B5gsk737gD2DDd_PU0-MVkcVpe7j0=&c=PuuNB3ks4lI1pVep5m36age_FlmgsaVbJwdYG-iQW02A06UloT4jug==&ch=rH7NM89DOpZViwb155dQOl_89rbwcPM-68FYEzwFznDiHFjeD6Sg8Q==)
Sincerely, Rob Costello Campaign Manager

| Kaleta,
[Preparation is over. This is a live fire exercise.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xJVo0_pRbb8KXxf4b7BQMor5G87pYkJOL3bQQHe9slNlZwc7eSSnbItvnyQ2YJ9PwBXW98watk7jKxyIj1GftTpzmqg3hSkncyIbH197QQhcpoIXEm8L501vWc5BfR25-x6j5AOci-xm_jC4krPtNTkFE0EIOUUNhGijg6aSqlwV_4B5gsk737gD2DDd_PU0-MVkcVpe7j0=&c=PuuNB3ks4lI1pVep5m36age_FlmgsaVbJwdYG-iQW02A06UloT4jug==&ch=rH7NM89DOpZViwb155dQOl_89rbwcPM-68FYEzwFznDiHFjeD6Sg8Q==) 💥
[Early voting for the March 3rd Election](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xJVo0_pRbb8KXxf4b7BQMor5G87pYkJOL3bQQHe9slNlZwc7eSSnbOYAE2wrQ5Jv5hWBA4YrvQmzL5eHM0Ifb09pF0XsNTW_uLWPUiNLF1yeI6cXKA6vRWa4mvRTAs_OYQOPEuxfIKZoMdCuT1NpX_JYxHcx1Dxc&c=PuuNB3ks4lI1pVep5m36age_FlmgsaVbJwdYG-iQW02A06UloT4jug==&ch=rH7NM89DOpZViwb155dQOl_89rbwcPM-68FYEzwFznDiHFjeD6Sg8Q==) is here and in order to take our fight to the Democrats this November, we've got to show the out-of-state liberals who want to buy Texas that we mean business and we're ready for war.
[That means 20 new donors before midnight TONIGHT to make our goal. Will you be one of the 20?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xJVo0_pRbb8KXxf4b7BQMor5G87pYkJOL3bQQHe9slNlZwc7eSSnbItvnyQ2YJ9PwBXW98watk7jKxyIj1GftTpzmqg3hSkncyIbH197QQhcpoIXEm8L501vWc5BfR25-x6j5AOci-xm_jC4krPtNTkFE0EIOUUNhGijg6aSqlwV_4B5gsk737gD2DDd_PU0-MVkcVpe7j0=&c=PuuNB3ks4lI1pVep5m36age_FlmgsaVbJwdYG-iQW02A06UloT4jug==&ch=rH7NM89DOpZViwb155dQOl_89rbwcPM-68FYEzwFznDiHFjeD6Sg8Q==)
The disturbing success of Bernie Sanders proves to us that [socialism is a real and rising threat.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xJVo0_pRbb8KXxf4b7BQMor5G87pYkJOL3bQQHe9slNlZwc7eSSnbItvnyQ2YJ9PwBXW98watk7jKxyIj1GftTpzmqg3hSkncyIbH197QQhcpoIXEm8L501vWc5BfR25-x6j5AOci-xm_jC4krPtNTkFE0EIOUUNhGijg6aSqlwV_4B5gsk737gD2DDd_PU0-MVkcVpe7j0=&c=PuuNB3ks4lI1pVep5m36age_FlmgsaVbJwdYG-iQW02A06UloT4jug==&ch=rH7NM89DOpZViwb155dQOl_89rbwcPM-68FYEzwFznDiHFjeD6Sg8Q==) If we want to protect our free market and freedom itself, we have to fight back.
[Can I count on you to stand beside me in this fight for our way of life and our nation's very future?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xJVo0_pRbb8KXxf4b7BQMor5G87pYkJOL3bQQHe9slNlZwc7eSSnbItvnyQ2YJ9PwBXW98watk7jKxyIj1GftTpzmqg3hSkncyIbH197QQhcpoIXEm8L501vWc5BfR25-x6j5AOci-xm_jC4krPtNTkFE0EIOUUNhGijg6aSqlwV_4B5gsk737gD2DDd_PU0-MVkcVpe7j0=&c=PuuNB3ks4lI1pVep5m36age_FlmgsaVbJwdYG-iQW02A06UloT4jug==&ch=rH7NM89DOpZViwb155dQOl_89rbwcPM-68FYEzwFznDiHFjeD6Sg8Q==)
[We have a hard deadline tonight and we need you on board!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xJVo0_pRbb8KXxf4b7BQMor5G87pYkJOL3bQQHe9slNlZwc7eSSnbItvnyQ2YJ9PwBXW98watk7jKxyIj1GftTpzmqg3hSkncyIbH197QQhcpoIXEm8L501vWc5BfR25-x6j5AOci-xm_jC4krPtNTkFE0EIOUUNhGijg6aSqlwV_4B5gsk737gD2DDd_PU0-MVkcVpe7j0=&c=PuuNB3ks4lI1pVep5m36age_FlmgsaVbJwdYG-iQW02A06UloT4jug==&ch=rH7NM89DOpZViwb155dQOl_89rbwcPM-68FYEzwFznDiHFjeD6Sg8Q==)

name: Team Lipinski
subject: Crunch Time!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

It’s crunch time! Just three weeks left until the primary election and we are feeling the momentum building each and every day across the communities of IL03. Dan’s campaign for commonsense leadership has garnered crucial endorsements from the Chicago Tribune, dozens of major labor unions, mayors and village presidents, and a strong team of district women leaders who favor results over rhetoric.

CHICAGO TRIBUNE ENDORSEMENT

Dan received the support of the Chicago Tribune, which noted in the endorsement how he has been in sync with his district and how his opponent’s massive spending plan spells disaster for working families. From the Tribune: “We’re concerned that (Newman’s proposed) massive government spending programs are unworkable and unaffordable. Lipinski’s outlook, which includes participation in the House bipartisan Problem Solvers Caucus, is both more moderate and realistic. Lipinski is endorsed.”

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-02-Tribune.gif]

DAN HAS BEEN ENDORSED BY CHICAGO POLICE AND FIRE UNIONS

Dan has received the endorsements of the two largest unions representing Chicago police officers and firefighters, representing more than 13,000 rank and file members of the city’s police and fire departments as well as department retirees.

"Congressman Lipinski has always offered unwavering support for our brothers and sisters in blue,” FOP Lodge 7 said in a statement. “He is someone that we can count on to help secure federal resources for policing initiatives. Dan Lipinski understands the challenges facing law enforcement and we are proud to endorse him for reelection."

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-02-FirstResponders.jpg]

ENDORSEMENTS KEEP ROLLING IN

Dan has received endorsements from more than 50 elected women leaders in IL03 and dozens of Chicago area labor unions. He also welcomed the support of Chicago Alderman Matt O’Shea and former mayoral candidate Jerry Joyce.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-02-Joyce-OShea.jpg]

COVERING EVERY CORNER

Team Lipinski is covering every corner of IL03 in the final weeks leading up to this crucial election. From the Valentine’s Day celebration with ladies in Bridgeview, to the Chili Cook Off In Lockport, Dan is traveling the district, listening, and learning from the residents who make this district the special place that it is.

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-02-Corners.jpg]

LIPINSKI SUPPORTERS ARE EVERYWHERE!

We are out in strong numbers walking in precincts across IL03 and greeting commuters to share Dan’s message of #commonsense leadership. We don’t worry about the snow, the rain or the cold! Just like Chicago’s weather, Dan Lipinski will always be here for you!

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/Feb-02-Everywhere.jpg]

JOIN TEAM LIPINSKI!

Grab a sign now for your window or front lawn while they last!! Click here to request a sign [http://www.lipinskiforcongress.com/volunteer] .

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP05/1/70880/images/SignPost.jpg]

PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS

Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list. [https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d29b8381-2157-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74/82789e19-4557-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Mjc4OWUxOS00NTU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LJzI1D7X_s73DwvtafQ7F39wEIyszjUN_k6W5v8gNys=&id=103593688&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com]

Dan Lipinski for Congress
P.O. Box 520
Western Springs, IL 60558
United States

body:

| | I don't shy away from tough fights and hard work. [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_febeom?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200224_FEC1_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200224_FEC1_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200224_FEC1_U2_X1") As a combat pilot in the U.S. Air Force, an all-American rugby player, and a mother of two, **I don 't shy away from tough fights and hard work.** Steve Chabot has been in Congress for almost a quarter of a century -- and he rakes in millions in dark money to help keep his seat. **But I 'm rejecting corporate PAC money because I believe Congress should be accountable to the people, not big moneyed special interests.** I know this will be another tough fight -- I'm more than ready, I've been fighting them my entire career. [**But with our final FEC deadline before the election in just two days, I need your help to come out on top. These deadlines are important, you know.
**When our numbers go public, Washington Republicans will use that information to decide if we can win this race.**
They're already attacking me -- calling me a "socialist loser." **So we have to show them we 're a strong, people-powered movement. That we're a force and we can win.**
And we need to have the resources to spread our message throughout the district -- that means we need to be able to post strong numbers to keep our tv ads running through election day.

name: =?utf-8?Q?George=20W.=20Hindman?=
subject: Hindman Under Attack From DC Insiders
body:
Have you seen the attacks coming from my opponent? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4a2618e9b408/hindman-under-attack-from-dc-insiders?e=52e38a8253)
---
| |
---
| | Friends,

Have you seen the fake attacks by the DC Establishment on my Campaign?

Renee Swann, one of my opponents, has stooped to a new low. A few days ago, her campaign sent out a text message to the district attacking me for a lawsuit that resulted from me losing my eye 10 years ago, and for my lawsuits with China, who tried to steal my intellectual property. See a picture of me below with a few of my patents.

The Washington Insiders fear my message. When Renee Swann was asked in a recent interview if she supports more restrictions on guns she answered "I am not prepared to answer at this time", and recently admitted to voting for Hilary Clinton in the 2008 Democrat Primary.

My team and I are working hard to spread the message of defending our country’s bedrock principles and standing strong for our conservative Republican values. We will continue to blaze the campaign trial and earn every vote!

Please consider [donating to our campaign](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=fd262fbce1&e=52e38a8253) and helping us get across the finish line. Whether it is a donation of [$25, $50, or $100,](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=c12d1f818b&e=52e38a8253) every dollar counts!

Thank you for you support,

-George

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump, Melania Visit Famed Taj Mahal After Joining Modi for Massive India Rally
body:
"President Trump and first lady Melania visited the Taj Mahal Monday, hours after the U.S. leader gave a rousing speech to more than 110,000..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=250d6894f8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump, Melania Visit Famed Taj Mahal After Joining Modi for Massive India Rally**

“President Trump and first lady Melania visited the Taj Mahal Monday, hours after the U.S. leader gave a rousing speech to more than 110,000 at a cricket stadium in Ahmedabad, India,” David Aaro and Ronn Blitzer report for Fox News.

“Trump's motorcade passed seemingly endless crowds in Ahmedabad with many cheering and waving American flags on the way to the 110,000 capacity Sardar Patel Stadium where the rally was conducted.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3d726451f7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “So-called ‘sanctuary’ jurisdictions all over the country are costing American lives while creating an incentive for illegal immigrants to keep attempting to cross our border in massive numbers . . . The $3.8 billion that the Trump administration just reallocated for additional wall construction is an investment in America’s future,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=27be7cf9ed&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “In early March, the World Intellectual Property Organisation will elect a new director-general for a six-year term. A leading candidate is from China, which has repeatedly drawn criticism for allowing counterfeiting and illegal expropriation of IP,” White House Director of Trade & Manufacturing Policy Peter Navarro writes in the [_Financial Times_.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=82fe32a639&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “So far 2020 has been a great year for our country and for President Donald Trump following an acquittal after the sham impeachment, the announcement of Opportunity Now and the January jobs report . . . President Trump has worked tirelessly for Americans through his pro-job, pro-family and pro-America agenda,” Rep. Joe Wilson (R-SC) writes in [_The North Augusta Star_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d224a0de7f&e=3ee4985eea).

---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8c426d353d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2735a724a2&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=ef788b1284)

name: Corky Messner
subject: WRONG for New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
This is a vital effort. Help us ramp up in this fight to DEFEAT Jeanne Shaheen!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4bf7831e497e3809/584d1ca5ee3e9d8cc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, My team wrote you about this last week. Today, I’m writing to ask again for your help.

We have JUST DAYS left to close February strong..._and we still need to raise $4,318 to reach our goal!_

**[Will you make a secure contribution today to sustain our fight?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4bf7831e497e3809/e51f3763aedc7f71c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

I know you agree that Jeanne Shaheen is wrong for New Hampshire. That should be obvious to anyone who’s paying attention.

Between her **assault on our gun rights, embrace of pro-abortion extremism, and partisan vote to convict President Trump** in the impeachment trial, it’s clear that she DOES NOT represent our Granite State values!

The question is... what are you willing to DO about it?

I’m giving my all to DEFEAT Jeanne Shaheen. I’m taking on her well-funded campaign, Chuck Schumer’s national Democrat political machine, and the left-wing special interests.

I’m doing so because I’m a patriot who loves America... _and I refuse to sit by while radical-left Democrats like Jeanne Shaheen attempt to tear us down._

**[** If you’re with me in this fight, please rush a $5, $10, $25, $50, or $100 contribution to help us reach our end-of-month goal!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4bf7831e497e3809/990b37f407eeb53bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [ Contribute HERE >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4bf7831e497e3809/400643befb053063c3d6b838967d376c/33153) We need a U.S. Senator who will work with President Trump to Keep America Great – not one who went all-in to lawlessly remove him from office.

We need a U.S. Senator who will PROTECT our gun rights – not one who is eager to trample the Second Amendment.

We need a U.S. Senator who will DEFEND THE DEFENSELESS – not one who believes that unborn children, and even babies who survive abortion, are disposable.

**I’ve served our country before, and I’m eager to do so again**. I’ll work with President Trump to keep our economy roaring and expand opportunity for people from ALL walks of life. I’ll fight with all I’ve got for our individual rights, real border security, our military and veterans, and the right to life.

We’re steadily building the momentum we need to “flip” this seat on Election Day 2020.

**[Help us keep up the fight!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4bf7831e497e3809/de61acb2039c3254c3d6b838967d376c/33153) **

\- Corky [ Contribute HERE >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4bf7831e497e3809/9c11a63e5f5dd0a6c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4bf7831e497e3809/ed0f6a594327fc81c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/4bf7831e497e3809/e942164b18ca218fc3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: MJ Hegar
subject: strong & steady
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489054b/7f51f7bc/4dee8bde/4ef1a84a/3045444630/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

With one week left until Primary Day, I wanted to reach out and tell you how grateful I am for all your support so far. Every dollar this grassroots team has raised has been crucial to getting to Election Day, and every donation is critical as we prepare to kick some ass in the next stage of this campaign. **[Can I count on you to chip in to help?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489054b/7f51f7bc/4dee8bde/4ef1a848/3045444630/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk1MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200224.1nd__952__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We're so close to the primary, but we still have more work to do. This campaign has been a whirlwind from start to finish. With hard work and support from this powerful team, we've maintained our position in the front of the pack throughout this primary. But this race is only going to get tougher, and I could use help to stay strong and steady going into the next stage of the campaign. **[_Can I count on your help on this ride?_](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489054b/7f51f7bc/4dee8bde/4ef1a848/3045444630/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk1MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200224.1nd__952__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

It takes a lot of money to travel all across Texas, reach out to undecided voters, and spread our message through digital and TV ads. There are STILL a lot of Texans who are undecided, even a week out from the primary, and **we're running out of time to reach them.**

Senator Cornyn is going to be fighting us for every voter all the way through November, and we need to make sure they're hearing our message first. **[That's why I'm asking for your help -- to reach out to those key swing voters who are waiting for a _fighter_ who will stick up for them in Washington.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489054b/7f51f7bc/4dee8bde/4ef1a848/3045444630/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk1MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200224.1nd__952__&amount=10&recurring=true")** The more people we get to come out and vote in the primary, the more who will stick with us all the way through to November.

Thanks for being part of our team, Peter!

\-- MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489054b/7f51f7bc/4dee8bde/4ef1a848/3045444630/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk1MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200224.1nd__952__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Every dollar this grassroots team has raised has been crucial to getting to Election Day, and every donation is critical as we prepare to kick some ass in the next stage of this campaign. "" We're so close to the primary, but we still have more work to do. This campaign has been a whirlwind from start to finish. With hard work and support from this powerful team, we've maintained our position in the front of the pack throughout this primary. But this race is only going to get tougher, and I could use help to stay strong and steady going into the next stage of the campaign. "" It takes a lot of money to travel all across Texas, reach out to undecided voters, and spread our message through digital and TV ads. There are STILL a lot of Texans who are undecided, even a week out from the primary, and we're running out of time to reach them. Senator Cornyn is going to be fighting us for every voter all the way through November, and we need to make sure they're hearing our message first. "" The more people we get to come out and vote in the primary, the more who will stick with us all the way through to November. Thanks for being part of our team, Peter! \-- MJ "" | MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard. MJ for Texas P.O. Box 7156 Round Rock, TX 78683 Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible. | | Paid for by MJ for Texas | | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please "".

body:

# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802999/4bef7a87/6d102473/287fa0a9/1772990702/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

_" I can assure you that there's two people that want you to vote for Senator Collins. One is the Senate Majority Leader and two is our president, President Trump."_
They're not wrong...Trump is all in to reelect Susan Collins because she has voted with him 94% of the time! And Mitch McConnell and his allies have already poured big money into her campaign so he can maintain his Senate Majority.
**Sara simply can 't take them on alone. The stakes are too high -- this race could determine control of the Senate! Sara needs our help:**

Remember, Sara made a pledge to refuse all corporate PAC donations, so we're counting on your support to keep our campaign moving forward.
So thanks in advance for chipping in, and thanks for your fight.
All our best,
Team Sara

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Can you imagine not having access to a grocery store?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Hi Peter,

It’s hard to live in a town without a grocery store -- but that’s the reality for many families in rural Iowa right now.

These families are forced to rely on gas stations or dollar stores for food to put on their kitchen tables. But these places don’t sell fresh produce or fresh meat, which undermines our overall nutrition, health, and ability to reach our fullest potential.

Many of our rural communities are fighting hard to keep their last remaining grocery store. In Gowrie (pop. 1,037), folks heroically came together to buy their grocery store to keep it open. Shortly after, the town of Manson (pop. 300) followed Gowrie’s example and are now rallying to reopen their grocery store.

**These stories are both heart-breaking and heart-warming, but we need to shine a light on them and share what’s really going on in the lives of everyday people.**

Food deserts aren’t just in rural America, they’re also in some of the biggest cities in our country like Chicago, Baltimore, and New York City. **No matter what zip code you live in, you should have access to affordable, quality, and healthy food.**

**[If you believe that all Americans should be able to buy affordable, quality food to put on their kitchen table for dinner, add your name to my petition.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15375855/162231623/126097500?ms=em20_200224_grocerystorept&refcode=em20_200224_grocerystorept&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBkNTgxYy01MzU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wK0NJI-9yCGlXC0xKmRq1yfQSEHs4xTzZcfwD-e3PVU=&emci=d76c9824-1757-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=970d581c-5357-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6658013)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15375856/162231624/126097500?ms=em20_200224_grocerystorept&refcode=em20_200224_grocerystorept&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBkNTgxYy01MzU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wK0NJI-9yCGlXC0xKmRq1yfQSEHs4xTzZcfwD-e3PVU=&emci=d76c9824-1757-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=970d581c-5357-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6658013)
To keep our grocery stores alive, we need to start by:
* Enforcing antitrust laws
* Protecting small businesses from big retail
* Strengthening unions
* Eliminating tax loopholes and subsidies for big corporations
* Supporting critical nutrition programs like SNAP and WIC
* Expanding and investing in local and regional food systems
* Backing local grocery stores, mobile grocery units, food hubs & co-ops
* Addressing the impacts of climate change on our farms and communities

Grocery stores are the linchpin of a community, keeping everything else afloat. Once a town loses its grocery store, it’s not long before the pharmacy closes, then the school or the bank, and then folks move away.

**We need you with us to fight for everyday people just like you and me who deserve healthy, affordable food to eat.**

**[Stand with folks across the country who live in food deserts from rural Iowa to NYC -- sign my petition today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15375857/162231625/126097500?ms=em20_200224_grocerystorept&refcode=em20_200224_grocerystorept&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBkNTgxYy01MzU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wK0NJI-9yCGlXC0xKmRq1yfQSEHs4xTzZcfwD-e3PVU=&emci=d76c9824-1757-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=970d581c-5357-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6658013)**

This is too important.

Standing Tall for All,

J.D. Scholten
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15375858/162231626/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200224_grocerystorept&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBkNTgxYy01MzU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wK0NJI-9yCGlXC0xKmRq1yfQSEHs4xTzZcfwD-e3PVU=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15375859/162231627/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBkNTgxYy01MzU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wK0NJI-9yCGlXC0xKmRq1yfQSEHs4xTzZcfwD-e3PVU=&emci=d76c9824-1757-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=970d581c-5357-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15375860/162231628/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBkNTgxYy01MzU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wK0NJI-9yCGlXC0xKmRq1yfQSEHs4xTzZcfwD-e3PVU=&emci=d76c9824-1757-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=970d581c-5357-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=6658013). Email is one of the most important ways we stay in touch with supporters like you, so we'd hate to see you go; but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d76c9824-1757-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74/970d581c-5357-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzBkNTgxYy01MzU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wK0NJI-9yCGlXC0xKmRq1yfQSEHs4xTzZcfwD-e3PVU=&id=109918160&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) from Scholten4Iowa emails.

name: Congressman Paul Gosar
subject: Are you feeling the Bern?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gosar for Congress, PO Box 2967, Prescott AZ 86302, USA [Unsubscribe](https://a1e0
body:
Stop the spread of Socialism When Bernie Sanders was elected to Congress in 1990, he was a political oddball. A self-proclaimed Socialist, who loves dictator Fidel Castro, honeymooned in communist Moscow, and refused to join the | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=5e544ea71db23c513715463d&u=https%3A%2F%2Fdrpaulgosar.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D5e54355cb17c8767967498b2%26ss_email_id%3D5e544ea71db23c513715463d%26ss_campaign_name%3DAre%2Byou%2Bfeeling%2Bthe%2BBern%253F%25C2%25A0%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2020-02-24T22%253A31%253A43Z&w=5d8babd15e0a4b5357b6f1b6&l=en-US&s=HBxCUGOoJC-iVTf3HGei1fXzfBc%3D)
---
| When Bernie Sanders was elected to Congress in 1990, he was a political oddball. A self-proclaimed Socialist, who loves dictator Fidel Castro, honeymooned in communist Moscow, and refused to join the Democratic Party because it was too conservative. Ha! Now he’s poised to be the Democratic nominee for President of the Greatest Nation in the World and that didn’t happen because Bernie changed – that happened because the Democratic Party changed – into Socialists. **Thank God for Donald J. Trump.** President Trump will never let Sanders and the Socialists take over this country and I will be right by his side fighting their anti-American agenda. **We cannot let them win. We won’t let them win!** These Leftists are funded by globalist billionaires who want open borders and the destruction of our families, our churches and our culture. I need your help to fight them. body:
Josh Hicks is running for Congress to represent hardworking and everyday Kentuckians, not corporations. That means he is relying only on grassroots support. Please consider making a contribution to Josh Hicks for Congress today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_footer_2019?refcode=BLU-hicks-header-link-nov&recurring=true] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6a88f9e8-e1bd-e911-bcd0-281878391efb/9fc2e1d4-5957-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMyZTFkNC01OTU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=o7dzA_vSShQOLBgLnn6QAHxXGmy3cQt2bBE2sFuqvH8=&id=120613561&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

Friend,
Since we launched my campaign for Congress, we’ve been out on the road – from Richmond to Mt. Sterling to Frankfort – meeting folks in different counties and getting their thoughts on what is important to them. Between those conversations and the delicious food at county fairs, it’s been great to hear from so many people across our community. I take listening to and learning from folks seriously.
But what matters to you? I want to know. Please take our quick survey today:
Priorities Survey >>> [https://s.surveyplanet.com/u4i72v63Fm]
I’m hoping I’ll be able to get to meet all of you in person soon, but until then our priorities survey will help me learn more about what matters to each of you.
Thanks so much,
Josh Hicks
BEGIN THE SURVEY [https://s.surveyplanet.com/u4i72v63Fm]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_footer_2019?refcode=BLU-hicks-footer-nov&recurring=true [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_hicks_footer_2019?refcode=BLU-hicks-footer-nov&recurring=true]
Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
Josh Hicks for Congress
PO Box 1214
Lexington, KY 40588
United States
Josh Hicks is running for Congress to be a representative who will put the needs of his constituents above his own. Josh grew up in Fleming County, before leaving to serve the country in the Marines. He then returned to Kentucky to serve his community, where he has served as a police officer and attorney. Josh wants to bring Kentucky’s values to Washington to fight for those who have no voice.
Josh is running to represent hardworking and everyday Kentuckians, not corporations. That means he is relying only on grassroots support. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Imprisoned for telling the truth about rapists . . .
body:
Late last week, I received this from UK activist, Tommy Robinson . . .
| | | [](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365505-856912-4880368-586152e496-3149ec2eea)
Patriot,

Late last week, I received this from UK activist, Tommy Robinson:

That’s a group of supporters from the UK in a pub with Tommy.

If you don’t know Tommy, he was sentenced to nine months in prison for reporting on the Huddersfield Grooming Gang – a group of 20 Muslim men who raped, trafficked and abused over a dozen underaged girls over a seven-year period.

Tommy Robinson spoke the truth about these men, calling them “Muslim child rapists” and was tried, convicted and imprisoned for his investigative journalism.

**Tommy’s struggle represents what our future in America will be if we don’t turn the tide RIGHT NOW.**

It’s why I’m running for Congress, and [_**why I need your support to win**_](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365505-856912-4880368-586152e496-3149ec2eea).

We’re just over $4,600 away from raising the money to finish our petition drive. [**Please help us meet this goal as we’re running out of time!**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365505-856912-4880368-586152e496-3149ec2eea)

My opponent, “Lazy Lois” Frankel, is the perfect example of how men like Tommy Robinson and women like me can have their lives shattered because we take a stand against evil and speak the truth.

While America faces a host of issues impacting the security of our nation and our communities, Frankel and the Democrats place their heads in the sand and excuse their deeds with their leftist values.

Help me stop them today, and [**help me get on the ballot by donating today**](http://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-365505-856912-4880368-586152e496-3149ec2eea).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Tina Smith
subject: Worried
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200224-mm6?refcode=em200224-mm6&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Folks, I just left my check-in with our finance team and I have some bad news to share with you:

We are only a few short weeks away from our first FEC deadline of the year and we're still not on pace to reach our most important goal of the campaign so far.

I'm a little worried because our race is a top target for Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their billionaire buddies who will spend whatever it takes to defeat me.

If our campaign doesn't post the strongest numbers possible at the end of the quarter, then Republican mega-donors and right-wing groups will think Minnesota is ripe for the taking.

That's why it's so important we hit our monthly goals before the end of the quarter. To compete with the kind of cash the GOP is showboating, we need a surge of grassroots contributions in the next few hours from folks like you. So, I'm asking:

**Can I count on you to donate any amount meaningful to you ahead of our end-of-month deadline to keep us on track for our first FEC deadline of the year? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't so important.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200224-mm6?refcode=em200224-mm6&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Reminder: Petitioning starts tomorrow!
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/dTjwpPpm9xvyqqWpz-rASjD6KxGutVYV0vSKUajx_po=/xc9Ze_t-jwmSb6SThemo0SDrbukHs5uXPZdJ_ck5CdM=)

Peter,

Starting tomorrow, February 25th, we'll officially begin petitioning to secure our spot on the June primary ballot -- and it's all hands on deck. **[Will you rush in a donation of $250, $100, or $50 today to ensure that our volunteers have everything they need to get off to a strong start?](https://act.myngp.com/el/dTjwpPpm9xvyqqWpz-rASjD6KxGutVYV0vSKUajx_po=/UbxcsCrDX2-tzfRRkQFVYzGri0fJgO2HVI44fOSJLRk=)**

******[PETITIONING STARTS TOMORROW: ARE YOU IN?](https://act.myngp.com/el/dTjwpPpm9xvyqqWpz-rASjD6KxGutVYV0vSKUajx_po=/UbxcsCrDX2-tzfRRkQFVYzGri0fJgO2HVI44fOSJLRk=)******

This is a huge test for our campaign: If we don't collect enough signatures in time, we won't be able to bring our fight to Congress. And the only way for us to collect those signatures is by going door-to-door and proving to voters why we deserve to be on the ballot. **[We've got a lot of ground to cover, but with your support today, I'm confident that our volunteer army will have the resources we need to get it done.](https://act.myngp.com/el/dTjwpPpm9xvyqqWpz-rASjD6KxGutVYV0vSKUajx_po=/UbxcsCrDX2-tzfRRkQFVYzGri0fJgO2HVI44fOSJLRk=)**

So if you believe in what we've built over the last seven months and want to see our campaign succeed, **[donate before midnight tonight and help us earn our spot on the ballot!](https://act.myngp.com/el/dTjwpPpm9xvyqqWpz-rASjD6KxGutVYV0vSKUajx_po=/UbxcsCrDX2-tzfRRkQFVYzGri0fJgO2HVI44fOSJLRk=)**

Best,
Adem
******[DONATE TODAY](https://act.myngp.com/el/dTjwpPpm9xvyqqWpz-rASjD6KxGutVYV0vSKUajx_po=/UbxcsCrDX2-tzfRRkQFVYzGri0fJgO2HVI44fOSJLRk=)******

name: Cory Booker
subject: It's almost the end of the month, team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate
body:
| | |
---
| That means we have an important goal to hit. Hey there, we're quickly approaching the end of the month. You know what that means: it's almost time to close the books on February and evaluate our fundraising for the month. My team crunched the numbers and they're telling me we need to raise _$150,000 by 11:59 p.m. on February 29th_ to stay on track. Staying on track isn't just a fundraising hook, team -- we need this money to make critical hires on the campaign and expand our reach in New Jersey. **I know we can do this. Can I count on you to contribute right now towards our end-of-month goal?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200224_CB_20200224-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express5&amount=5&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200224_CB_20200224-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express10&amount=10&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200224_CB_20200224-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express22&amount=22&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200224_CB_20200224-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_express100&amount=100&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---
| [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200224_CB_20200224-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_expressother&express_lane=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=&amounts=5,10,22,50,100")
---

I'm so grateful that we were able to get this re-election effort off to a fast start. As you may recall, we exceeded our January fundraising goal -- which allowed us to scale up quickly and begin building a formidable campaign.
**[Now, it's time to keep it going. Please chip in today -- $5, $10, $20, whatever you can -- to help us reach our critical February goal.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200224_CB_20200224-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I bet Mitch McConnell and all of my Republican challengers will be watching closely to see if we're able to reach this goal. Let's prove to them that this grassroots team can always rise to the occasion.
Thanks in advance for stepping up when it matters most.
Sincerely,
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-launch-em?refcode=em_fr_20200224_CB_20200224-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Cory Booker for Senate.
---

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa1/5fca0d19/7a315566/291d0705/1461122554/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa1/5fca0d19/7a315566/291d0704/1461122554/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa1/5fca0d19/7a315566/291d0703/1461122554/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0fa1/5fca0d19/7a315566/291d0702/1461122554/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/unsubscribe").

name: petition@maggiehassan.com
subject: End Citizens United >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc48c/2a380d31/226181e0/f08e25/3944850854/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc48c/2a380d31/226181e0/f08e25/3944850854/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hi there,
About ten years ago, the Supreme Court handed down its ruling in _Citizens United_ , paving the way for corporate special interests to spend unlimited, anonymous money to buy our elections.
One of Senator Hassan's first acts in Congress was to cosponsor a constitutional amendment to overturn _Citizens United_.
It's simple -- our democracy should not be for sale to the highest bidder.
The good news is, you can join Senator Hassan and tell Congress to end _Citizens United_ by signing our petition. [**Put your name down now to say that you want to get dark money out of our elections.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc48c/2a380d31/226181e0/f08e26/3944850854/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstopcitizensunited-jointaction%3Frefcode%3De20201_ecuja_all")
With control of the White House and the future of the Supreme Court at stake in this year's elections, it has never been more important for you to make your voice heard.
[**Please, add your name to tell Congress to end _Citizens United_.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc48c/2a380d31/226181e0/f08e26/3944850854/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/OverturnCitizensUnited/?code=Hassan&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstopcitizensunited-jointaction%3Frefcode%3De20201_ecuja_all")
Thank you,
Team Maggie
[Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc48c/2a380d31/226181e0/f08e27/3944850854/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDIyNF8yMDIwMDEyMWVjdWphLVJTX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20200224_20200121ecuja-RS_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")

name: Team Sri
subject: Check out who’s joined YOU on Team Sri, friend!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoTTjBcwUkRk1u85wOb3q6z2_GLe8O3tHUFwLvQ_qN0=/TxJznBGjYcDfeyZrdEVMEC2BR_jfX8gcHOJeIB9tz0E=?refcode=20200224&amount=25&recurring=1)
---
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoTTjBcwUkRk1u85wOb3q6z2_GLe8O3tHUFwLvQ_qN0=/QrfLYQtJ6bTRdlH_YHd1FTHIi_SbspxgeiRMR6tlUOM=) | _" I am proud to endorse Sri Kulkarni to represent the people of Texas' 22nd District. Sri has dedicated his life to bringing people together, both here at home and while he was serving our country overseas. I look forward to working with Sri to help deliver results for the people of Texas on healthcare."_ **-Rep. Joaquin Castro (TX - 20)**
---|---
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qoTTjBcwUkRk1u85wOb3q6z2_GLe8O3tHUFwLvQ_qN0=/QrfLYQtJ6bTRdlH_YHd1FTHIi_SbspxgeiRMR6tlUOM=) | _" Sri spent his career standing up for American values and strengthening our credibility across the world. The ideals he exemplified as a foreign service officer are what we need more today than ever. This administration has gutted the State Department and failed to stand up for what is right. That is one of the many reasons our nation needs someone like Sri in Congress to help bring back diplomacy at home and abroad. I look forward to working with Sri again."_ **-Rep. Tom Malinowski (NJ - 7)**

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
We need strong fighters who will beat them in Congress. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?e=795c6d9796&u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f61f6d92bc)

---
| Peter, Bernie Sanders has now won the first three nominating contests in the Democrat Party. Election forecasters say that he has the highest chance of winning the nomination of any of the candidates.

If there was ever any doubt before, there can't be now. The Democrat Party is the party of socialism.

Here's the thing though. I believe President Trump will make short work of Bernie and AOC and the Squad. But that doesn't mean these socialists will go away. They'll all still be in Congress, with Bernie and Elizabeth Warren in the Senate and AOC and her Squad in the House.

That means we need principled conservative fighters ready to to make the case for freedom and defeat the radical left in Congress. We can't settle for just any Republican.

I'm a proven fighter with a record of taking on the liberal establishment. I can beat Kendra Horn in November and give conservative Oklahomans the representation they deserve in the Swamp.

Remember, this is no ordinary House race. National Journal has said this will be the #1 contest in America in 2020. There's no opportunity for error.

[**That's why I'm asking for your support. With your donation of $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 we can ensure that we beat Kendra Horn in November and make sure we have a principled fighter in Congress ready to take on the radical left.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=928608a98a&e=795c6d9796)

Please consider donating just a few dollars to help power our campaign for freedom, liberty, and conservative Oklahoma values. [**Just a little bit goes a long way.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=39eb673086&e=795c6d9796)

Thank you for everything you do for our great state.
Best,
[](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=e1f0bac424&e=795c6d9796) \--Janet Barresi

body:
Do you agree: Attorney General Barr must resign immediately?
---
| | | **10,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY:** [**11:59PM 02/24/2020**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b69a/18e32a7f/4e226024/7b222dcd/1880425001/VEsH/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/anti-corruption-survey?source=20200224_em_pet_b1_rav_ia") Quickly -- Attorney General Barr has recommended a MASSIVE sentence reduction for convicted Trump crony Roger Stone -- _directly overruling federal prosecutors._ Barr's disregard for the rule of law is horrifying. It must stop NOW. **Do you agree: Attorney General Barr must resign immediately?** _[**_YES!! >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b69a/18e32a7f/4e226024/7b222dcd/1880425001/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/anti-corruption-survey?source=20200224_em_pet_b1_rav_ia")_** _**[_No_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b69a/18e32a7f/4e226024/7b222dcd/1880425001/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/anti-corruption-survey?source=20200224_em_pet_b1_rav_ia")**_**
---

This is horrifying:

After Trump criticized the sentence of his convicted crony Roger Stone...

**Attorney General Barr overruled federal prosecutors and recommended a REDUCED SENTENCE for Stone.**

Barr's disregard for the rule of law is staggering. It's horrifying. And it needs to STOP now.

[_**Will you take our emergency poll and DEMAND Barr resign before our justice system is irreversibly damaged? We need 10,000 responses before midnight >> **_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b69a/18e32a7f/4e226024/7b222dcd/1880425001/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/anti-corruption-survey?source=20200224_em_pet_b1_rav_ia")

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b69a/18e32a7f/4e226024/7b222dc2/1880425001/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b69a/18e32a7f/4e226024/7b222dc3/1880425001/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b69a/18e32a7f/4e226024/7b222dc0/1880425001/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement? **[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b69a/18e32a7f/4e226024/7b222dc1/1880425001/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b69a/18e32a7f/4e226024/7b222dc6/1880425001/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails")

Can you believe that, Peter!?

Here’s what Bernie Sanders said:

_“We're very opposed to the authoritarian nature of Cuba but you know, it's unfair to simply say everything is bad. When Fidel Castro came into office, you know what he did? He had a massive literacy program. Is that a bad thing?”_

It’s bad enough that the Democrats have a PROUD socialist as their leading candidate, but now he is openly _**DEFENDING**_ Fidel Castro’s dictatorship! Bernie’s words are _**INSULTING**_ to every Cuban-American that fled Castro’s oppressive regime and they diminish the atrocities that Castro committed.

South Florida will NEVER support a socialist President, especially not one who defends authoritarians like Fidel Castro. And neither should our representative!

**It’s time for us to call on Donna Shalala and ask her to publicly denounce Bernie Sanders as the Democratic Nominee.** **[Support our campaign for Congress to reject Donna Shalala and her silence against Socialism.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=d5a17c1f6dab477bbd36e34ae73ab2c9&_e=i3HS3_bl7CVH1Rd0rFkW1Yjm_h_lEjpeiNfDMnS3vDWdi2536s7GYaG-0QBe71Ctj1fD3YASVQoGMvRczYgeFxf_rve7vLauYSPdW7DnQDruZJvRZ0eNPjFmHw8qt9HoarF3jMQ4Le7RDswlnMkjFoDlxaiP26ZovmjHAzAcQsv-V3cAAmWPbdSTVQyo5tHpYQU57otYY9g7b3X-5HtC7serUauTMESAaT-XrytmXxbhIsen6HHGhT37vzM4q1jVn2HdKBChwUtvUAeMa-tZjBp0gEx1CoDHbCgpRVsZnLjFpCkdHzTZ6aAxQiaPCySeAz2cw5gpXp5uHF8CLjYZ6NsiQJ5jplekcLeOTKegzOwuy0QAJCckOGfHrImn0R-21ilBBeYYNcPsPYUlAkxMmA%3D%3D)**
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: MUST-WATCH VIDEO: President Trump in India!
body:
President Trump addressed a loud, cheering crowd of more than 100,000 earlier today at India’s Sardar Patel Gujarat Stadium. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dc278b6059&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 24, 2020
---
| | |
# **MUST-WATCH VIDEO: President Trump in India!**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f1b0b099cc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **President Trump** addressed a loud, cheering crowd of more than 100,000 earlier today at India’s Sardar Patel Gujarat Stadium. He praised India’s growing prosperity and its “ironclad resolve” in joining the global fight against radical Islamic terrorism.

**“The First Lady and I** have just traveled 8,000 miles around the globe to deliver a message to every citizen across this nation: America loves India, America respects India, and America will always be faithful and loyal friends to the Indian people,” he said.

**Five months ago,** President Trump welcomed Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi to Houston, Texas, where they were greeted by a lively crowd at the [“Howdy Modi” rally](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8443fd85c3&e=3ee4985eea).

**The sequel** took place this morning in Ahmedabad, India, at a rally fittingly called “Namaste Trump.” Speaking in the largest cricket stadium on Earth, President Trump thanked the Indian people “for the contributions your culture and traditions have made to my beloved country.”

**A powerful friendship** grew between America and India after President Trump’s election, particularly as trading partners. Since Inauguration Day 2017, commerce between the two countries has shot up more than 40 percent. That’s made India into a major market for U.S. exports, and it cemented America as India’s largest export market.

**President Trump:** [America is booming, and that’s good news for India!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0df137c68e&e=3ee4985eea)

**The U.S.–India bond** under President Trump and Prime Minister Modi is also making American safer and more secure. The two are cooperating closely to defeat global terrorism and combat drug trafficking. Together, they are also calling on other countries in the region—including Pakistan and Iran—to fight terrorism in their own backyards.

**Shared values** make this alliance possible. “In America and in India, we know that we are all born for a higher purpose: to reach toward our fullest potential, to work toward excellence and perfection, and to give all glory to God,” President Trump said.

**🎬** [President Trump: India will be getting the best military equipment on the planet!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=048d309c84&e=3ee4985eea)

**Behind the scenes** : [See photos from President Trump’s visit to India!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fcb303559e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and Prime Minister Narendra Modi stand together before a cheering crowd at the Namaste Trump Rally** | February 24, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fa975deaee&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=54c477b383&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=d64f2b180c)
---

---

body:

| Peter, The Christie Institute for Public Policy was founded with the mission of introducing meaningful, bi-partisan discussions on how to solve the greatest challenges facing the world. Undeniably, one of the greatest issues we face today is healthcare. I’m excited to announce that the Christie Institute for Public Policy will host An Important Discussion on National Healthcare this spring. The event will feature a series of discussions with national experts in healthcare and healthcare policy.

If you are interested in attending this event [please click here](https://christieinstitute.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c62c4d5c98958cc280ee81bb&id=445e35da84&e=65ae29fa7e), and we’ll keep you up to date with the latest developments and details.
