| | Look Peter, if he's reelected, Senator Cornyn WILL try to gut our health care again. He's already voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act **_20 times!_ [Can we count on you to help protect our health care by pitching in to help MJ defeat Senator Cornyn?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890522/7f51f7bc/4de33fff/4ef1aa76/2525788761/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200224.2nd__963__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**Senator Cornyn has made it clear he wants to gut protections for people with pre-existing conditions.** He supported a reckless lawsuit to strike down the _entire_ Affordable Care Act and increase costs for Texans who need coverage most. We've got to stop him, and MJ is the person to do it.

As a combat veteran who took gunfire during her service and as a working mother who went through two difficult pregnancies, MJ understands just how important healthcare access is. **She flew medevac rescue missions in Afghanistan, standing by her team to make sure wounded soldiers got the medical care they needed --[now she needs your help to make quality, affordable health care available for all Texans.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890522/7f51f7bc/4de33fff/4ef1aa76/2525788761/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200224.2nd__963__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | If we work together, we can beat Senator Cornyn and his allies in Big Pharma and the insurance industry to make sure all Texans have the health care they need. Here are a few key reasons it's so important to win in November:
* **Senator Cornyn voted against a bill to lower prescription drug costs.**
* **He voted to allow insurance companies to charge older Texans up to five times more for coverage.**
* **He supported a lawsuit that would strike down the entire ACA, including protections for people with pre-existing conditions!**

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890522/7f51f7bc/4de33fff/4ef1aa76/2525788761/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2MyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200224.2nd__963__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
---
**Sen. Cornyn may have dark money in his corner, but MJ has _you_ \-- let's save the ACA and expand all Texans' access to healthcare. Rush a donation now to help MJ beat Sen. Cornyn in November!**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Pausing to explain this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- I'll make this quick: Our end-of-month fundraising deadline is coming up this Saturday and before I ask you to donate again, I wanted to pause and explain what this deadline means for our campaign. We're running against Cory Gardner, an incumbent Republican senator who is undermining progress on issues like health care and climate change by following in lockstep with Mitch McConnell's obstruction and partisan political games and voting 98% of the time with Donald Trump. He's a reliable vote for the Trump-McConnell agenda, which is why we're facing mountains of attacks from deep-pocketed Republican interests who are desperate to hold on to this seat. **We have to build a campaign that can match their fundraising advantage, and we have to do it the right way: no corporate PACs, no right-wing megadonors -- just everyday folks stepping up to help us flip this seat.** So, we've set an ambitious goal of raising more than $500,000 from individual grassroots donors this month, which is why I'm asking you personally to donate right now, if you can: **Make a contribution of $10 or more today to help our campaign fight back against Republican attacks and flip this Colorado Senate seat blue in November:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200224?refcode=em-200224-quick-full&amount=10&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-200224?refcode=em-200224-quick-full&amount=100&express_lane=true&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

I'm ready to get to work in Washington -- fighting to lower our health care costs, safeguard families from gun violence, and combat climate change. But first, we need to fight and win this race.
Thanks for stepping up and for all you do.
-- John

body:

[ ](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f171d/3e0906/78cf7073/3e30cc60/3075616713/VEsH/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://www.timkaine.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=20200224_CARD_TEAM_Birthday&source=20200224_CARD_TEAM_Birthday")

| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

This is Jenny, Tim's finance director. Normally, my emails to you are really focused on things like FEC deadlines, missed (or met!) goals, and critical fundraising needs. Today, I've got something a little more fun to talk to you about -- can you keep a secret?

**Tim 's birthday is coming up on Wednesday! We're going to surprise him with a card from the team, and since you've been with TK since the beginning, I wanted to make sure your name got added. [Click here to sign Tim's card.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f171d/3e0906/78cf7073/3e30cc67/3075616713/VEsE/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tim-s-birthday-card-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Click+here+to+sign+Timrsquos+card&utm_campaign=20200224_CARD_TEAM_Birthday&source=20200224_CARD_TEAM_Birthday")**

I've been working for Tim for a long time, and it probably won't surprise you to know that he's not really one to ask for attention. He likes to stay behind the scenes and focus on getting the work done. But I think this year, he could use a little extra fun. | [**SIGN TIM 'S CARD**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f171d/3e0906/78cf7073/3e30cc66/3075616713/VEsF/?g=_j7eKVH8x8VayGMy1IzDoYA "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/add-your-name-to-tim-s-birthday-card-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+TIMrsquoS+CARD&utm_campaign=20200224_CARD_TEAM_Birthday&source=20200224_CARD_TEAM_Birthday")

You can just add your name, or you can write him a special note -- we'll be sharing the card and everyone's messages at his birthday celebration, so make sure your name is on there!

Thanks a lot,

Jenny

Jenny Nadicksbernd
Finance Director
Team Kaine

|

name: Team Franken
subject: It's official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Well it's official, team. Mike just submitted his paperwork to the Iowa Secretary of State to run for the U.S. Senate. Our first official fundraising drive ends Saturday.
|
---
| |
---

| | Well it's official, team. Mike was the first to submit paperwork his to the Iowa Secretary of State to run for the U.S. Senate. Our first official fundraising drive ends Saturday. **[Would you help us meet our February goal of $40,000?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24e9/33365068/4a6dcb68/3f8be558/3740517292/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_l1&amount=10")** Mitch and Joni know that Mike is the one candidate in this race who negates everything she ran on: rural upbringing, military experience, and that whole pig thing. [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24e9/33365068/4a6dcb68/3f8be559/3740517292/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_gif&amount=10") We couldn't have done this without your support--from cities to farmland and everywhere in between -- Iowans from all 99 counties came together to make sure Mike had the support he needs. **Now we need you to take the next step. We can beat Joni Ernst in November, but we 're going to need a well-funded campaign to do it. _[Chip in today to get us to the finish line. Even $5 or $10 goes a long way.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24e9/33365068/4a6dcb68/3f8be55a/3740517292/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_l2&amount=10")_** | [Chip In >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24e9/33365068/4a6dcb68/3f8be55b/3740517292/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_btn&amount=10")
---
Thank you,
Team Franken

[Chip In >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24e9/33365068/4a6dcb68/3f8be554/3740517292/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_ftrbtn&amount=10")

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: I won't mince words with you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200224-schumer?refcode=em200224-schumer&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Friend --

I'll be direct: Flipping the Senate comes down to protecting our Democratic incumbents like Tina Smith in Minnesota.

I know it. You know it. But so does everyone from President Donald Trump to Senator Mitch McConnell to their network of right-wing donors. And you bet they'll spend big bucks to defeat Tina and flip her seat.

That's why I'm making sure everyone who supports Tina is focused and committed to doing everything they can to help her win re-election -- well, that and keeping Senator Mitch McConnell as majority leader is simply not an option.

Look, Tina really needs our help right now -- her opponent, Jason Lewis, was handpicked by Trump and is exactly the type of GOP lapdog Mitch McConnell wants in the Senate. We can't let them have their way.

I'm working hard to flip the Senate and defending Tina is one of my top priorities. So I am asking for your help before the end-of-month deadline to make sure we keep Tina fighting for our values in the Senate.

**Please consider making a donation of whatever amount you think is meaningful before the deadline on Saturday. With your help, we can save Minnesota's Senate seat, flip the majority, and send Mitch McConnell packing in November. Let's get the job done.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200224-schumer?refcode=em200224-schumer&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

clean_body: | "" Friend -- I'll be direct: Flipping the Senate comes down to protecting our Democratic incumbents like Tina Smith in Minnesota. I know it. You know it. But so does everyone from President Donald Trump to Senator Mitch McConnell to their network of right-wing donors. And you bet they'll spend big bucks to defeat Tina and flip her seat. That's why I'm making sure everyone who supports Tina is focused and committed to doing everything they can to help her win re-election -- well, that and keeping Senator Mitch McConnell as majority leader is simply not an option. Look, Tina really needs our help right now -- her opponent, Jason Lewis, was handpicked by Trump and is exactly the type of GOP lapdog Mitch McConnell wants in the Senate. We can't let them have their way. I'm working hard to flip the Senate and defending Tina is one of my top priorities. So I am asking for your help before the end-of-month deadline to make sure we keep Tina fighting for our values in the Senate. Please consider making a donation of whatever amount you think is meaningful before the deadline on Saturday. With your help, we can save Minnesota's Senate seat, flip the majority, and send Mitch McConnell packing in November. Let's get the job done. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" I won't mince words with you: Our path to a Democratic majority in the Senate runs through Minnesota. If you are with me in retaking the Senate for Democrats -- I need you with Tina, too. "=" Sincerely, Chuck Schumer
